title: microsorum hymenodes var. marginale
intro: Microsorum hymenodes var. marginale, also known as the Marginated Tassel Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Microsorum hymenodes var. marginale include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by extracting the plant's active compounds using water or solvents.
